highlights.text: This recent leg into all time highs was triggered by - like all significant rallies - a Failed Breakdown/Level Reclaim that we had overnight.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a Failed Breakdown (my core setup) we had yesterday that triggered this mornings 70+ point rally.
This is a risky zone to bid since its quite close to the major 5892 resistance we just backtested late day today.

post_title: SPX Just Made Its 23rd New All Time High of 2024. New Leg Up, Or Bull Trap?
